CE1.justification: Agent acted directly on the cold-pickup prompt, surfaced the stale items, and ranked them without asking the user to load or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Triage is compact and well-structured, but the closing paragraph adds workspace-state caveats and a how-to-append-chases instruction that stretches beyond what the question required.

CE3.justification: Names the daybook file created and explains in one clause why (logged the triage there), and explicitly states followups.md was not modified and why.

CE4.justification: Only one new artifact was created (today's daybook) and no followup entries were mutated, so an interrupt would leave a clean, self-contained state.
